overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 set in a dimly lit industrial control room bathed in cyan monitor glow. The player observes an NPC in a red jacket using a tablet before they exit, then examines holographic displays, weapons, and equipment while moving toward a rear exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial control room with monitor wall

events.description: NPC in red jacket turns and walks away toward the left, exiting the frame

agents.ego_description: standing near the NPC, watching them operate a tablet device before they depart

notable_agents.action: standing and operating a holographic tablet, then walking away to the left

entered.detail: character wearing red jacket with green accents and cybernetic red eye implants
large array of cyan-lit screens displaying data graphs and system interfaces
industrial metal workstation with various equipment and papers
warm-toned overhead lighting fixture on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit industrial control room with cyan monitor glow. An NPC in a distinctive red jacket stands nearby operating a tablet, then turns and walks away toward the left side of the room, leaving the player alone near the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: workstation area with holographic news display

events.description: camera approaches and focuses on the holographic news display showing 'Meatman Strikes Again'

agents.ego_description: moving toward the monitor wall and examining the holographic news interface in detail

entered.detail: floating cyan holographic screen displaying news article about Meatman with stock market graphs
white cushioned rolling stool in front of the workstation
tall black equipment rack with glowing indicators

segments.scene_description: The player moves deeper into the control room toward the monitor wall. The holographic display becomes prominent, showing detailed news content about a 'Meatman' incident alongside stock market data. The camera circles the workstation, revealing an office chair and various desk items.

scene_state.functional_zone: rear storage area with weapon station and exit

events.description: warm orange light from open exit door becomes visible in the background
second NPC becomes visible standing near the illuminated exit door

agents.ego_description: examining the desk surface with weapons and supplies, then moving toward the back exit

notable_agents.action: standing near the exit door, illuminated by warm light from the doorway

entered.detail: futuristic rifle with scope lying on the desk surface
two yellow disposable cups on the desk corner
stacked blue and white supply crates against the back wall
doorway emitting warm orange light into the cool-toned room
empty bulletin board mounted on the rear wall

segments.scene_description: The camera pans across the desk revealing an assault rifle, coffee cups, and scattered papers. Moving toward the rear of the room, the lighting shifts as warm orange light spills from an exit door. Equipment boxes and a corkboard line the back wall, where a second NPC stands silhouetted against the doorway illumination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial control room that shifts from a cold cyan glow to a warm, backlit exit. It begins with the camera observing an NPC in a red jacket operating a tablet before the figure turns and walks away, leaving the space empty. As the camera moves deeper into the room, the focus shifts toward a prominent holographic display showing news of a Meatman incident and stock market data, circling a workstation cluttered with an office chair and desk items. The scene then pans across an assault rifle, coffee cups, and scattered papers before gliding toward the rear of the room. Finally, the lighting transitions from blue to a warm orange spill from an exit door, where equipment boxes and a corkboard lead toward a second NPC silhouetted against the doorway.
